ai_tips: Starting out at 13m — 4.59km ahead with 52m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔13米出发——全程4.59公里，累计爬升52米。
0.43km in — pace 6:38/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.43公里——配速6:38/公里，强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 0m of the 5m climb done, grade here 0%. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——5米总爬升已完成0米，此处坡度0%。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 18m at 0.97km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点18米，位于0.97公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -21.2% at 3.17km — you let it flow at 6:23/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：3.17公里处坡度-21.2%——你顺势加速到6:23/公里，下坡信心不错。
4.12km — late-run check: pace 5:42/km, still holding form well. 4.12公里——后程检查：配速5:42/公里，节奏保持得不错。
Finished 4.59km in 28:30 (avg 6:12/km, +52m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成4.59公里，用时28:30（平均配速6:12/公里，爬升52米）。全程稳定扎实。
